modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty resizing and moving an embedded chart in Excel.

full_description_text: A field technician is experiencing issues with an embedded chart in Excel. The chart cannot be resized or moved as intended. This problem is affecting their ability to present data effectively.
short_description: Difficulty resizing and moving an embedded chart in Excel.
description: A field technician is experiencing issues with an embedded chart in Excel. The chart cannot be resized or moved as intended. This problem is affecting their ability to present data effectively.
